TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tomislav_Nikolić, title = Tomislav_Nikolić, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tomislav_Nikolić} }

S.FORM: Tomislav Nikolić ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Tomislav Nikolić, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Serbia ta' misuw hya' ga Tomislav Nikolić, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Tomislav Nikolić ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Tomislav Nikolić, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Serbia ta' misuw hya' ga Tomislav Nikolić, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tomis~ɕla* nikoli* rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tomis~ɕla* nikoli*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕerβia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa tomis~ɕla* nikoli*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
